Guelph, Ontario  ·  Summer 2026

Play, Build, Master

Developing young players' technical skills, positional awareness, and football intelligence through the Total Football philosophy.

Ages 12–17 UEFA C Licensed Coach Small Groups Boys & Girls
Join the Interest List
The Philosophy

What is Total Football?

A tactical system where every player can be a defender, playmaker, or attacker. Using triangles and diamonds, players learn to create space, support teammates, and influence the game.

01

Tactical Intelligence

Read the game, anticipate opponent moves, and exploit space before it appears. Train your football brain.

02

Positional Fluidity

Develop and thrive in any role. Attacker, midfielder, or defender. Become the player the moment demands.

03

Technical Mastery

Master first touch, ball control, and passing accuracy. Every rep is under pressure, just like match day.

04

Collective Responsibility

The team's structure is fluid. Every player must understand when to cover, press, and support.

Age Groups

Find Your Level

Three distinct tracks built around player development stage, not just age. Each group has its own focus and objectives.

12–13
Football Foundations

Learn the Game

Build fundamentals: tactics, technical ability, and how to link up with teammates. The perfect entry point for players serious about development.

14–15
A-Team Player

Expand Your Role

Understand how every position works and increase your value to any team. Multi-position players significantly raise their chances of selection.

16–17
Lead by Example

Master the Game

Elevate decision-making, game intelligence, and communication. Become an influential leader who can impact any game at any moment.

Session Structure

What a Session Looks Like

Every session is designed to maximize time with the football and develop sharp decision-making through real game situations.

1

Individual & Small-Sided Games

1v1, 2v2, or 3v3 depending on focus. Weekly individual and team competitions.

2

Rotation of Roles

Players experience different positions within the flow of the game. Improve your all-round game.

3

High Tempo

Improve fitness, decision-making, and control under friendly competitive pressure.

Coach Led

Sessions run by an internationally certified coach with a UEFA C License, trained in modern player-centred methods.

Programs & Pricing

Choose Your Block

Both programs run one session per week outdoors in Guelph. Exact days and times will be confirmed based on interest.
